title: BEM-943 Block L audit
objective:
Run script:
"""
def write_file(path, text):
    p=Path(path)
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(p))

write_file('governance/validators/validate_block_l_audit.py', '''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from pathlib import Path
required = [
  'governance/audit/claude_reaudit_checklist.json',
  'governance/audit/evidence_index.json',
  'governance/audit/audit_bundle_manifest.json'
]
missing = [p for p in required if not Path(p).exists()]
if missing:
    raise SystemExit('MISSING: ' + ', '.join(missing))
manifest = json.loads(Path('governance/audit/audit_bundle_manifest.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
missing_includes = [p for p in manifest['include'] if not Path(p).exists()]
if missing_includes:
    raise SystemExit('MISSING_BUNDLE_INCLUDE: ' + ', '.join(missing_includes))
print('BEM-943 Block L audit validator PASS')
''')

Next: Block M validation harness and roadmap status rollup.
No issue comments.
''')

ctx=Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
append='''\n\n## BEM-943 completed | 2026-05-31\nImplemented Block L audit baseline after BEM-942.\nCreated Claude re-audit checklist, evidence index, audit bundle manifest and validator.\nResult: BLOCK_L_AUDIT_BASELINE_PASS. This is foundation evidence, not external audit PASS.\nNext: Block M validation harness and roadmap status rollup.\nNo issue comments.\n'''
ctx.write_text(ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')+append, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(ctx))
ops_applied.append('BEM-943 Block L audit artifacts created')
"""
